query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.email,
  COUNT(t.id) as total_transacoes
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN transactions t ON u.id = t.userId
WHERE u.email = 'adri_assis@hotmail.com'
GROUP BY u.id, u.email;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 26x2gGqtj2qmxT9.dbac34d63271 --database BpLVoFkZmNnvLiHEa2tSFD --execute SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.email,
  COUNT(t.id) as total_transacoes
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN transactions t ON u.id = t.userId
WHERE u.email = 'adri_assis@hotmail.com'
GROUP BY u.id, u.email;
